meta.notes:
Slack /stoa Slash Command handler for STOA AI Factory (v3 — consolidated for n8n v2).

Single Code node handles: Slack signature validation, command parsing, access check, routing + execution.
Replaces multi-node v2 which used Switch v3.2 (broken in n8n v2.8.4).

Commands: help, status, queue [stats|pause|resume], scan, implement CAB-XXXX.
Required env vars: SLACK_SIGNING_SECRET, GITHUB_PAT, SLACK_ADMIN_USERS, SLACK_ALLOWED_USERS, HEGEMON_REMOTE_URL, HEGEMON_REMOTE_PASSWORD.
Required n8n env: NODE_FUNCTION_ALLOW_BUILTIN=crypto,https,url,buffer, N8N_BLOCK_ENV_ACCESS_IN_NODE=false.
